headline: Home Depot Shareholder Proposals Test ESG Oversight And Premium Valuation
summary: Shareholders at Home Depot, NYSE:HD, have filed a wide range of proposals ahead of the upcoming annual general meeting, focusing on governance, environmental, social, and data privacy topics. The proposals address officer exculpation, board leadership structure, biodiversity assessments, plastic use reduction, employee healthcare access, charitable contribution transparency, and customer data privacy reporting. Home Depot's board is urging investors to vote against most of these resolutions,...

headline: Home Depot acquires warehouse automation firm to speed fulfillment
summary: Home Depot has bought a warehouse automation firm to help speed item picking. The post Home Depot acquires warehouse automation firm to speed fulfillment appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Can Strategic Investments Drive Home Depot's Next Leg Up?
summary: HD leans into Pro, digital fulfillment and SRS/GMS deals to spark growth as FY26 comps are forecast at flat to more than 2%.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: Stocks are headed for a lower open, and oil prices are higher this morning as Iran war tensions reignite in the Strait of Hormuz.
